title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 86.557 - Funeral expenses, when, amount
text:
86.557.  Funeral expenses, when, amount. — Whenever an active or retired policeman shall die as aforesaid, the board of trustees may appropriate from the fund, a sum not exceeding three hundred dollars to his widow or legal heirs for funeral expenses.
(RSMo 1939 § 9492, A.L. 1973 H.B. 106) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 8931
